title: Cobbleworkers: Farmer's delight
description: Datapack that adds integration for farmer's delight blocks in cobbleworkers.
body:
Datapack that adds integration for Farmer's Delight in Cobbleworkers!

It adds some tags in the cobbleworkers namespace to group the farmer's delight blocks to easily implement the job.

NOTE: This only adds support for the base farmer's delight blocks.
